coordinateBridge.policy: project FPS hilt/tip through calibrated T-pose frame; fixed FK arm projection; no IK, no roll, no retarget mutation

summary.recommendation: Fix Meshy attachment rotation/basis before changing arm motion or placement.

findings: Average socket error is 0.00325; this keeps WeaponGrip/socket alignment separate from rendered grip landmark alignment.
Average picked grip error is 0.00325; placement classification uses this rendered attachment grip landmark metric.
Average hilt landmark error is 0.00325; hilt placement is inside the small-error threshold 0.08.
Average blade direction error is 36.918 deg; this exceeds the large-direction threshold 12 deg.
Average blade length ratio is 1.65438; length is meaningfully mismatched by the 0.08 ratio threshold.
Dominant class is orientation/basis, so the single next production fix is: Fix Meshy attachment rotation/basis before changing arm motion or placement.
